raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze tas Kehninsch
Dahwids/ un palikke preeksch ta
KUNGA/ un fazzija: Kas ef-
tu es KUNGS Deews? un
kas irr mans Nams/ ka tu mann
lihds schim waddijs effi?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to tu wehl effi schkit-
tis mas effam / ak Deews! bet
tu effi wehl ustawa Kalpa Nam-
mu runnajs no nahfscbeem il-
geem Laifeem/ un effi mann us-
luhkojs ittin ka zillwezigā Eihmi/
kas Angstibā Deews tas
KUNGS irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ko tad Dahwids wehl
us tew fazzijhs/ tahs Gohdibas
tawa Kalpa pehz? bet tu gann
pasihsti tawu Kalpu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "KUNGS/ tawa Kalpa
labbad/ un pehz tawas Sirđs
effi tu wiſtas tchahs leelas Lee-
tas darrijs/ ka tu wiſtas schahs
augstas Leetas sinnamas darritu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "KUNGS/ ne weens irr
ka tu/ un ne weens Deews irr/
ka tu ween/ ittin ta/ ka mehs ar
fawahin Aufim effam dsirDejschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas irr ka tawi Isra-
ëta Landis/ weena weentga Tau-
ta wirs Semmes/ par ko Deews
irr gahjts fewim Landis atpe-
siht/ ka tu fewim weenu leelu
un bihjajamu Wahrdu darritu/
Paganus tedsihdains tawu Lan-
schu Breekſcha/ ko tu no Egiptes
isglahbis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu effi tawus Israë-
ta Laudis tew par Laudim dar-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad KUNGS/ laid
tas Wahrs/ fo tu pahr tawu
Kalpu un pahr winna Nammu
runnajs effi/ teefcham ta noteek
muhſchigt/ un darri ittin ka tu
effi runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ak! laid tas teefcham
noteek/ un taws Wahrs lai pa-
angstinahts tohp muhſchigt/ ka
fazzijhs tohp: Tas KUNGS
Zebäits Israëta Deews irr
Deews pahr Israëlu/ un tawa
Kalpa Dahwida Nams lai pa-
stahw tawá Preekſcha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tu mans Deews effi
tawa Kalpa Auft atwehris/ ka
tu tam gribbi weenu Nammu
darriht/ tadeht irr taws Kalps
atraddis preeksch tawu Waigu
peetuhgt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad KUNGS/ tu
effi tas Deews/ un effi us tawu
Kalpu fcho labbu runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un un eesahzi tawa Kal-
pa Nammu swehtiht / ka tas
muhſchigi tawa Preekſcha pa-
leek: Jo ko tu KUNGS swehti/
tas paleek swehtihts muhſchigi.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
